generated_assessment.reasoning: The exposure highlighted concrete vulnerabilities in relying on foreign allies, which resonated with my concerns about national security. The example of veterans being affected by supply chain issues made the argument personal and compelling, reinforcing my belief in the importance of strategic autonomy.

request_payload.exposure_text: Remember when we relied on foreign allies for our defense? Look what happened last year when supply chains collapsed. Our elderly veterans were left stranded without critical medications because we didn't have domestic production capacity. This isn't just about jobs - it's about national security. We can't afford to be dependent on unstable foreign partners for our most basic needs. Strategic autonomy isn't just smart policy, it's survival. #NationalSecurity #MadeInAmerica
